title: Digital Twin Dashboard
description: An interactive dashboard for indoor pollen tracking.

content.overview: A digital twin system that visualizes real-time pollen levels indoors. It integrates environmental data from sensors and APIs to help users manage allergies.

sections.title: About
sections.text: This digital twin dashboard provides real-time indoor pollen monitoring, helping users track and manage their environment for better allergy management.

sections.title: Technical Details
sections.text: Built with Svelte and D3.js, the dashboard fetches data from environmental sensors and the OpenWeather API to create an accurate picture of indoor air quality.
